CONTENT: 1️⃣ Before the Retro
Schedule the retrospective meeting
Invite all team members
Review actions agreed in the previous retrospective
Select a retrospective format (e.g. Start / Stop / Continue)
2️⃣ Set the Stage (5 mins)
Reinforce the purpose: improve the system
Remind the team this is a safe and blameless environment
Run a quick check-in to get everyone engaged
3️⃣ Gather Data (10–15 mins)
Collect items: What went well this sprint?
Collect items: What didn't go well this sprint?
Collect items: What surprised us?
Ensure everyone has had a chance to contribute
4️⃣ Generate Insights (10–20 mins)
Group similar items together
Identify patterns or recurring themes
Discuss root causes — ask "why" at least once per theme
Prioritise the most impactful items to focus on
5️⃣ Decide Actions (10–20 mins)
Select 1–3 concrete improvement actions
Ensure each action is specific and achievable within the next sprint
Assign an owner to each action
Agree on how progress will be tracked
6️⃣ Close (5 mins)
Summarise the agreed actions aloud
Collect quick feedback on the retrospective itself
Reinforce accountability — confirm owners are clear
7️⃣ After the Retro
Capture all actions as tasks in Todoist or GitHub Issues
Prioritise actions into the next sprint
Share retro notes with the team
Set a reminder to review actions at the start of the next retrospective
